sections.title: Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Woo wooo?

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Me? I am a Knight of the Wolf. I serve the fierce Justiciar of the Wolf!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of the Wolf?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Aye, the most loyal and fiercest of Saradomin's followers! We are the bastion against all that is evil.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's this Justiciar of the Wolf?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: You haven't heard of...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to her?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: I was hoping you could tell me... Ah, the white wolf we called her... For she had the brightest hair you'd ever seen. A silver so bright it could blind. Some said she had icyene blood, but those close to her knew better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take it you were close?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Close enough. The white wolf was but a mere human, albeit with astounding prowess on the battlefield... She vied for Saradomin's attention the most out of all the justiciars.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Why do you think that was?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Ah, well... She always wanted to be stronger and never seemed happy with what she had. There was always more.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Was there anything else you wanted?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any great battles to speak of?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: There was this time a great evil swept over Hallowvale...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah! The vampyres?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: The what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Y'know? The ones with the wings and all the blood sucking?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: No, don't be so ridiculous. As I was saying... A great evil...

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: The common folk called it the Egregore. They said it could shift and change shape at a moments notice into creatures from the deepest abyss...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds terrifying.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: These folk, they tend to exaggerate. It wasn't until the nobles started spreading word of its ghoulish features, each more horrible than the last...

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Talons as sharp as runite, fire-breath, mind reading abilities... Worst of all though, they said it couldn't be killed!

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: That was when we took an interest in killing the thing. We are Knights of the Wolf after all! Our duty is to eradicate all evil.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woah! How does one vanquish such a foe?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Well, we made short work of it. That is what we do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, how?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: With a big sword of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah... A favorite method of mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah... I prefer a carefully placed arrow myself. Each to their own though.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: It does the job! Once we had shown the head of the beast to the masses, talk of the Egregore soon died down. At least... for a while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It returned?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Yes. It was strange... As soon as the small folk had forgotten about the Egregore, rumours started to arise that it had returned. And so it had! That was the nature of this beast.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So it was truly undying?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Does the Egregore still haunt these lands, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I can't say I've seen it...

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Then you must assume we were quite successful! At least by the time of my passing, the beast hadn't returned. Although, who knows? It could have taken any form by now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I can't say for certain, but you look pretty old.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Your humour is wasted on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm off now, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: May the light of Saradomin guide you, adventurer.

sections.title: Upon opening a coffin in the Hallowed Sepulchre
Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: Woo? Woo wooooooooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Wolf
lines.text: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
